section-2.subTitle: Fresh Seafood marinated in soy sauce, new batch every day
section-2.title: Authentic Freshness, 100% Preservative-Free

description.text1: At Cô Thảo Tôm Cá, we only work with premium seafood, ensuring every ingredient meets the highest standard of freshness.
description.text2: In our kitchen, all ingredients are sourced from the finest suppliers. From Norwegian salmon, Cà Mau crab, Phan Thiết blue crab, and fresh farm-raised shrimp, to Korean abalone, free-range eggs, and even the smallest components — everything is carefully selected, prepared fresh daily, and never treated with preservatives.
description.text3: Our signature soy sauce is crafted based on an authentic Korean recipe, thoughtfully adjusted to suit Vietnamese taste — it is deeply flavorful while maintaining a refreshing lightness, completely oil-free, allowing the natural sweetness of every cut to stand out.
description.text4: "Fresh batch, every day" is not just a phrase, but a core standard at Cô Thảo Tôm Cá — freshness is not a choice, it is a requirement.

section-3.title: Why choose Co Thao Tom Ca?

description.text1: With a network of four outlets dedicated to delivery, Cô Thảo Tôm Cá ensures optimal speed and quality in every order. We place great care in our packaging process, designed to preserve each dish from the effects of temperature and transit time — delivering a complete, premium experience to every meal.

section-2.title: Rooted in respect for pure ingredients
section-2.subTitle: Becoming a pioneer and market leader in fresh seafood marinated in rich sauce

description.text1: It all began with a deep appreciation for salmon — one of the most nutritionally rich and refined ingredients in culinary culture.
description.text2: From this perspective, we gradually explored the world of Korean-style soy-marinated seafood — where each ingredient is not merely a component, but the foundation of the dish itself. We came to realize that a truly authentic marinade is not defined by seasoning alone, but by the freshness, purity, and intrinsic quality of every ingredient.
description.text3: Cô Thảo Tôm Cá was built upon this belief. We do not pursue mass production or extended preservation. Instead, we embrace a handcrafted approach, preparing only limited fresh batches each day to preserve the natural firmness and delicate sweetness of premium-grade seafood — just as it is meant to be.

value1.title: Premium-Grade Ingredients
value1.description: We use only top-tier ingredients in every preparation. Absolutely no preservatives — preserving the pure, natural flavor while ensuring a wholesome and health-conscious experience.

value2.title: Professional & Safe
value2.description: Every step of the preparation is carried out by hand, under the care of a professionally trained team, strictly following food safety standards. Our kitchen environment and tools are maintained to be hygienic, sterile, and meticulously organized at all times.

value3.title: Freshness, True to Taste
value3.description: Seafood is kept at its freshest — plump, firm, and naturally sweet. Paired with our signature soy marinade, it delivers a refined and well-balanced dining experience.

value4.title: Attentive & Dedicated
value4.description: A complete meal goes beyond just great food. At Cô Thảo Tôm Cá, we put genuine care into every touchpoint, delivering not only quality dishes but also a thoughtful and reassuring dining experience.

section-5.description: Whether you are an office worker looking for a rich dinner, or a family in need of a delicious change of pace, Co Thao's Kitchen is always open to welcome you.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Co Thao Tom Ca Kitchen is always ready to answer any of your questions. With our utmost care and enthusiasm, if you need flavor recommendations or help picking the perfect dish for today, don't hesitate to reach out to us right away!

form.title: How can Co Thao Kitchen assist you?
